CONTENT.Career: González started his career with River Plate Montevideo in 2014. He joined Peñarol in January 2018. On 29 January 2022, González moved abroad and signed a two-and-a-half-year contract with La Liga side RCD Mallorca.González received his first call-up to Uruguay national team in March 2019 for the 2019 China Cup. He debuted on 22 March 2019 in a 3–0 victory against Uzbekistan, as a 61st minute substitute for Diego Laxalt.
CONTENT.Personal life: González is the son of former Uruguayan international Juan González.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the RCD Mallorca websiteGiovanni González at National-Football-Teams.comGiovanni González at WorldFootball.net

SUMMARY: Giovanni Alessandro González Apud (born 20 September 1994) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a defender for La Liga club Mallorca and the Uruguay national team. Mainly a right-back, González can also play as a centre-back.
